---
title: "Wer macht das?"
subtitle: "Geschlechterunterschiede in der Zeitverwendung in Österreich"
execute:
  eval: true
  echo: false
  output: true
  warning: false
  error: true
  include: true
---

Zeit ist eine begrenzte Ressource – und sie ist ungleich verteilt. Die Zeitverwendungserhebung der Statistik Austria zeigt: Frauen leisten nach wie vor den Großteil der unbezahlten Arbeit in Österreich, während Männer mehr Zeit in Erwerbsarbeit verbringen. Diese unsichtbare Arbeit – Kochen, Putzen, Kinderbetreuung, Pflege – hält unsere Gesellschaft am Laufen, wird aber weder entlohnt noch in wirtschaftlichen Kennzahlen erfasst.

Diese Visualisierung macht die Ungleichverteilung sichtbar. Jede Figur steht für rund `{ojs} width > 1200 ? "zwei" : width > 600 ? "vier" : "zehn"`  von hundert Personen: <span style="color: #c1272d; font-weight: bold;">rot</span> für Frauen, <span style="color: #1e3a5f; font-weight: bold;">blau</span> für Männer. Auf einen Blick zeigt sich, wer welche Tätigkeiten übernimmt. Im Auswahlmenü sind jene Aktivitäten farblich hervorgehoben, bei denen besonders große Geschlechterunterschiede bestehen. 

{{< include src/00_libs.qmd >}}
{{< include src/00_utils.qmd >}}

```{ojs}
makeIsoline = (params = {}) => {
  const {
    data = null,              // array of row objects: { key, value (0-1), subkey?, shapes?, fillHighlight?, fillNormal? }
    vizWidth = width,         // total SVG width in px; defaults to Observable's reactive viewport width
    cellWidth = 18,           // horizontal space per figure in px — controls packing density
    cellHeight = 100,         // row height in px
    personHeight = 100,       // Isotype glyph font-size in px — effectively the figure height
    persPerLineValue = Math.floor(vizWidth / cellWidth) - 1, // figures per row; determines the "N per 100" scale
    defaultShapes = "abcdefghilmnopqSBDEGHIJKLNOPRSTVWXYZ", // fallback glyph pool from the Isotype font; per-row shapes override this
    defaultFillHighlight = "steelblue", // fallback color for highlighted (active) figures; per-row fillHighlight overrides this
    defaultFillNormal = "#ddd",         // fallback color for non-highlighted figures; per-row fillNormal overrides this
    randomOrder = true,  // true: scatter highlighted figures via MD5 hash; false: pack them left-to-right
    groupByKey = false   // true: rows sharing the same key are grouped under one <h3>; false: each row gets its own <h3>
  } = params;

  // Group data by key if groupByKey is true
  const dataGroups = groupByKey
    ? Array.from(d3.group(data, d => d.key), ([key, items]) => ({ key, items }))
    : data.map(item => ({ key: item.key, items: [item] }));

  // Create rows for each group
  const rows = dataGroups.map((group, groupIndex) => {
    const groupRows = group.items.map((item, rowIndex) => {
    const highlightValue = item.value;
    const shapes = item.shapes || defaultShapes;
    const fillHighlight = item.fillHighlight || defaultFillHighlight;
    const fillNormal = item.fillNormal || defaultFillNormal;
    const subkey = item.subkey || "Personen";
    const highlightCountValue = Math.round(persPerLineValue * highlightValue);

    // Generate person with custom alphabet
    const generatePersonCustom = seed => {
      const avatarChoices = shapes;
      const id = "person_" + d3.format("0>4")(seed) + "_row" + rowIndex;
      const avatar = randomOrder
        ? avatarChoices[parseInt(md5(id).slice(0, 2), 16) % avatarChoices.length]
        : avatarChoices[seed % avatarChoices.length];
      return {
        id,
        avatar,
        highlight: seed < highlightCountValue ? true : false
      };
    };

    // Render person with custom colors
    const renderPersonCustom = (p) => {
      const fillColor = p.highlight ? fillHighlight : fillNormal;
      const strokeColor = "#fff";

      return svg`
        <g class="person">
          <text y="0"
            style="font-size: ${personHeight}px; font-family: Isotype"
            fill="${fillColor}"
            stroke="${strokeColor}"
            stroke-width="3">
            ${p.avatar}
          </text>

        <text y="0"
          style="font-size: ${personHeight}px; font-family: Isotype;"
          fill="${fillColor}">
            ${p.avatar}
        </text>
        </g>
      `;
    };

    // Create the SVG visualization for this row
    const people = d3.range(persPerLineValue).map(generatePersonCustom);
    const height = cellHeight;

    const vizSvg = html`
      <svg width="${vizWidth}" height="${height}">
        <g transform="translate(0, 80)">
          ${people.map((p, i) => ({ p, i })).reverse().map(
            ({ p, i }) => svg`
            <g transform="translate(${i * cellWidth}, 0)">
              ${renderPersonCustom(p)}
            </g>`
          )}
        </g>
      </svg>
    `;

    // Create the percentage span
    const percentageText = html`
      <span style="color: ${fillHighlight}; font-family: DM Sans; font-weight: 280;">
        ${Math.round(highlightValue * 100)} von 100 ${subkey}
      </span>
    `;

    // Return row with label
    return html`
      <div style="margin-bottom: 6px;">
        ${groupByKey && rowIndex === 0 ? html`<h3 style="font-family: DM Sans; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 12px 0;">${group.key}</h3>` : html``}
        ${!groupByKey ? html`<h3 style="font-family: DM Sans; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 12px 0;">${item.key}</h3>` : html``}
        ${percentageText}
        ${vizSvg}
      </div>
    `;
    });

    // Return group container
    return html`
      <div style="margin-bottom: ${groupByKey ? '0px' : '0px'};">
        ${groupRows}
      </div>
    `;
  });

  // Return all rows in a container
  return html`
    <div style="margin: 0px 0 0 0">
      ${rows}
    </div>
  `;
}
```

```{ojs}
timeUse = FileAttachment("data/zeitverwendung_long.csv").csv({typed: true})
```

```{ojs}
// Prepare all data for visualization
// Using Otto Neurath Isotype-style colors: red for women, blue for men
vizData = timeUse.map(d => ({
  key: d.activity,
  subkey: d.gender === "women" ? "Frauen" : "Männer",  // German display label
  gender: d.gender,
  value: d.participation_pct / 100,
  shapes: getShapes(d.activity, d.category, d.gender),
  fillHighlight: d.gender === "women" ? "#c1272d" : "#1e3a5f",  // Neurath red / Neurath blue
  fillNormal: d.gender === "women" ? "#e8d5d5" : "#d5dce3"      // Light tints
}))
```

```{ojs}
// Build activity groups from category column, marking high gender differences
activityGroups = {
  const grouped = d3.group(timeUse, d => d.category);
  const thresholdAbs = 5;   // percentage points (absolute difference)
  const thresholdRel = 50;  // percent (relative difference)

  return Array.from(grouped, ([category, items]) => ({
    label: category,
    options: [...new Set(items.map(d => d.activity))].map(activity => {
      // Get the first row for this activity (difference is the same for both genders)
      const row = items.find(d => d.activity === activity);
      const diffAbs = row?.diff_participation || 0;
      const diffRel = row?.diff_relative || 0;
      const absDiffAbs = Math.abs(diffAbs);
      const absDiffRel = Math.abs(diffRel);

      // Mark as highlighted if absolute difference > 5pp OR relative difference >= 50%
      let highlight = null;
      let marker = "";
      if (absDiffAbs > thresholdAbs || absDiffRel >= thresholdRel) {
        highlight = diffAbs > 0 ? "female" : "male";
        marker = diffAbs > 0 ? " (F+)" : " (M+)";
      }

      return {
        value: activity,
        label: activity + marker,
        highlight: highlight
      };
    })
  }));
}

viewof selectActivity = groupedSelect({
  value: "Erwerbstätigkeit - Gesamt",
  groups: activityGroups,
  title: "Wählen sie eine Aktivität: ​ "
})
```

---

```{ojs .mainViz}
isolines = makeIsoline({
  data: vizData.filter(d => d.key == selectActivity),
  persPerLineValue: width > 1200 ? 50 : width > 600 ? 25 : 10,
  cellWidth: width > 1200 ? 23 : width > 600 ? 23 : 28,
  randomOrder: false,
  groupByKey: true
})

selectedData = timeUse.filter(d => d.activity === selectActivity)
womenData = selectedData.find(d => d.gender === "women")
menData = selectedData.find(d => d.gender === "men")

// Calculate differences
diffAbs = womenData?.participation_pct - menData?.participation_pct
diffRel = womenData?.diff_relative

activityLabel = selectActivity.replace(' - Gesamt', '')

htl.html`<p style="margin: 0px;">
  <span style="color: #c1272d; font-weight: bold;">${Math.round(womenData?.participation_pct)}%</span>
  aller <span style="color: #c1272d; font-weight: bold;">Frauen</span>
  geben an, in einer Woche Zeit mit <strong>${activityLabel}</strong> zu verbringen.
  Frauen verbringen im Schnitt
  <span style="color: #c1272d; font-weight: bold;">${womenData?.participant_hours.toFixed(1).replace('.', ',')} Stunden</span>
  damit. Für <span style="color: #1e3a5f; font-weight: bold;">Männer</span>
  belaufen sich diese Zahlen auf
  <span style="color: #1e3a5f; font-weight: bold;">${Math.round(menData?.participation_pct)}%</span>
  und <span style="color: #1e3a5f; font-weight: bold;">${menData?.participant_hours.toFixed(1).replace('.', ',')} Stunden</span>.
  Der Unterschied beträgt ${Math.abs(diffAbs).toFixed(1).replace('.', ',')} Prozentpunkte
  bzw. ${Math.abs(diffRel).toFixed(0)}%.
  ${diffAbs !== 0 ? `${diffAbs > 0 ? 'Frauen' : 'Männer'} üben die Tätigkeit häufiger aus.` : ''}
</p>`
```

<p style="margin-top:12px">Datenquelle: [Statistik Austria – Zeitverwendung](https://www.statistik.at/statistiken/bevoelkerung-und-soziales/zeitverwendung){target="_blank"}</p>


---

<h3>Danksagung</h3>

- Idee basierend auf Umsetzung von [Basile Simon](https://observablehq.com/@basilesimon/isotype-sketch-a-wee-people-bar-chart){target="_blank"}
- Isotype Font von [Ric Stephens](https://www.dafont.com/isotype.font){target="_blank"}
